home.title: Online Toolbox
home.subtitle: 30+ free online tools, all running in your browser to protect your privacy

imageToBase64.description: Convert images to Base64 Data URI

weightConverter.name: Weight Converter

dataSizeConverter.name: Data Size Converter
dataSizeConverter.description: Convert Bytes, KB, MB, GB and more
